mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE DATE(member_created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE YEARWEEK(member_created_at, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_delete_status = '탈퇴' AND DATE(member_deleted_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_delete_status = '탈퇴' AND YEARWEEK(member_deleted_at, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)
